title: sterculia stipulata
intro: Sterculia stipulata, also known as the horse-field or horse-fig tree, is a species of flowering plant in the sterculia family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The health benefits of Sterculia stipulata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, Sterculia stipulata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer various health benefits when consumed or applied topically.
